acceptanceCriteria: The recorded required check passes over the full uncommitted GH-14 diff including this remediation; other verification commands (format:check, lint, typecheck, test, test:all, bench, validate-plugin, plugin validate --strict) are rerun and their results reported in the PR
The current attempt must be bound to the named routing plan and the input budget must equal the plan-authorized budget, both failing closed
Escalation decision schemas reject extra link properties, unbounded numerics, and reason codes the selector never emits
Threat-model and orchestration wording disclose that the infrastructure retry limit is identical-fingerprint-gated with the global budget as backstop
No existing test is modified, removed, or weakened; remediation behavior is covered by additive tests only
constraints: Do not modify or weaken existing acceptance tests
Do not invoke model providers outside the recorded consultation protocol
Do not persist raw logs or secrets
Treat runtime identity, reasoning effort, tokens, and provider cost as unavailable
stopConditions: a required check fails twice without a new hypothesis
